label: Rule pack data
description: Container for grammar rules defined inline or by file reference.

rulesStrings.label: Rules (strings)
rulesStrings.description: Inline grammar rules in the format 'keyword(p=weight)->output text'. Each li is one rule definition.

rulesFiles.label: Rules (files)
rulesFiles.description: File-backed grammar rules in the format 'Keyword->Language/File/Path'. Each line of the file becomes a selectable output.

rulesRaw.label: Rules (raw objects)
rulesRaw.description: Structured grammar rule objects. Each li must carry a Class attribute identifying the Rule subclass.

include.label: Include
include.description: Additional RulePackDefs whose resolved rules are merged into this rule pack.
